notes: I already have a 32-bit wine prefix with wmp10 and some other things that I was using for the remake of the first Resident Evil, as per this guide: https://www.reddit.com/r/linux_gaming/comments/aehhu5/resident_evil_remaster_hd_setup_guide/. I simply pointed this game to that wine prefix, and now the game seems to work perfectly. Cutscenes and all.
